title: ecuadorella harlingii
intro: Ecuadorella harlingii is a genus of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Ecuadorian tree, native to Ecuador. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ecuadorella harlingii include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a potential natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Ecuadorella harlingii include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
